nodes.label: AI as collaborative organizer and pattern-finder
nodes.grounding_span: I provide the material and the AI helps me organize and see patterns

nodes.label: Human-driven creative agency
nodes.grounding_span: continue to be the driver in generating the creative material

nodes.label: Authenticity of original material
nodes.grounding_span: left all of the text from the conversation as is, verbatim

nodes.label: AI as enabler of uninterrupted creative flow
nodes.label_negative: Creative friction due to organizational burden
nodes.grounding_span: Now I feel free to continue writing as long as the information is flowing

nodes.label: Creative productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: help make the process faster and easier

nodes.label: Authentic self-expression
nodes.grounding_span: the authentic conversations which took place

nodes.label: Creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: choose to drive the creative part of the process

nodes.label: Positive embrace of AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: it has been very much a collaborative process

nodes.label: Realistic concern about AI replacing human creativity
nodes.grounding_span: AI is being used more and more to generate creative material, with very little true creative input from a human

nodes.label: Pragmatic acceptance of AI competition
nodes.grounding_span: I really can't spend too much time worrying about the fact that I am competing directly against AI

nodes.label: Stream-of-consciousness writing with deferred organization
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to write in a 'stream of consciousness' fashion

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement with AI
nodes.grounding_span: the model and I work together to decide on the best logical directions
